heading_content_part: We do not collect personal information (such as: files, email address, phone number, physical address, fax,        ssn and etc), We only collect device-specific information (Android OS and others).

heading_content_part: We are concerned about safeguarding the confidentiality of your information. We provide physical, electronic,        and procedural safeguards to protect information we process and maintain. For example, we limit access to this        information to authorized employees and contractors who need to know that information in order to operate,        develop or improve our Application. Please be aware that, although we endeavor provide reasonable security
